name: FactSet Financial Data API
what_it_does: FactSet REST APIs for institutional-grade financial data and analytics platform. Enables AI agents to manage equity fundamental data retrieval including income statement, balance sheet, and cash flow for financial modeling, handle market data including real-time and historical price, volume, and corporate actions data, access fixed income data including bonds, yield curves, and credit ratings, retrieve global company entity and identifier mapping (CUSIP, ISIN, SEDOL, ticker), manage portfolio analytics including attribution, risk, and performance measurement, handle estimates and consensus data from sell-side analyst coverage, access private equity, M&A, and deal data for investment banking and PE analytics, retrieve supply chain and alternative data for investment research, manage ESG scores and sustainability metrics for responsible investment, and integrate financial data with portfolio management, risk, and trading systems.
use_cases: Retrieving company fundamentals from financial modeling agents
Accessing consensus estimates from investment research agents
Analyzing portfolio attribution from risk management agents
Mapping securities identifiers from data management agents
not_for: Retail investor tools without institutional data licensing requirements
Real-time trading without appropriate market data licensing
Simple stock screening without comprehensive financial data needs
best_when: An asset manager, hedge fund, or investment bank using FactSet wants AI agents to automate fundamental data retrieval, estimates analysis, portfolio analytics, identifier mapping, and financial research workflows.
avoid_when: LICENSING RISK: FactSet data is licensed per use case and user; redistributing FactSet data in downstream products without appropriate licensing violates data agreements. Real-time data distribution requires exchange-specific data licenses beyond FactSet subscription. AI model training on FactSet data may require specific licensing terms beyond standard subscription. Investment decisions based on AI analysis of licensed data require disclosure review.

auth.notes: FactSet uses OAuth 2.0 and API key (FactSet authentication). Developer portal at developer.factset.com. Open-source SDKs on GitHub (factset). No webhooks — polling and batch for data updates. REST API with JSON. Norwalk, Connecticut HQ. Public (FDS NASDAQ). FactSet Developer Community with extensive documentation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription with data licensing
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; data packages, user count, and use case determine pricing
pricing.notes: Norwalk, Connecticut. Founded 1978. Public (FDS NASDAQ). $2.0B+ annual revenue. Financial data and analytics for institutional investment. 8,000+ clients including 200,000+ investment professionals. Strong in buy-side asset managers and investment banking. Competes with Bloomberg and Refinitiv (LSEG) for institutional financial data.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; varies by data package and subscription tier

known_agent_gotchas: LICENSING RISK: FactSet data redistribution and AI training use cases require specific data licensing beyond standard subscription; review data agreement before automated downstream use
Exchange data licensing — real-time price data from specific exchanges requires exchange data licenses beyond FactSet subscription; verify exchange-specific license entitlements
Identifier mapping complexity — global securities use multiple identifiers (CUSIP, ISIN, SEDOL, ticker); build robust identifier resolution before cross-system financial data integration
Point-in-time data for backtesting — use point-in-time (PIT) data endpoints for quantitative backtesting; current data includes restated financials that create look-ahead bias
No webhooks — data update events require polling; batch download endpoints are more efficient for large data refreshes than per-security polling
Consensus estimates vintage — analyst estimates data has as-reported and revised history; specify estimate vintage carefully for time-series analysis to avoid survivorship bias
agent_readiness.security_notes: Institutional financial data and analytics. SOC2, GDPR, MiFID2. OAuth2. US/EU. Securities, fundamental, and estimates data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Institutional financial data. SOC2, MiFID2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Securities and fundamental data.
